Bulgu: Family/Pro self-serve checkout does not persist Individual-level disclosure and consent snapshot. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts around legal disclosure creation; packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma IndividualConsent.
Neden sorun: Checkout records ToS/privacy metadata but not the regulated disclosure/consent model used by the app's legal domain, so higher-risk plan purchases may be auditable only through weak Stripe metadata.
Önerilen çözüm: Before Stripe session creation, require the plan-specific disclosure acknowledgement and store IndividualConsent/LegalAcceptance with plan, billing interval, IP/user agent, and versioned document IDs.

Bulgu: Pricing selected plan/billing interval is not preserved through the sign-up/subscription entry.
Neden sorun: A user can choose a price on the marketing page but land in a generic sign-up/onboarding path, increasing conversion drop-off and making plan intent ambiguous.
Önerilen çözüm: Carry plan and interval through URL/session state into onboarding and checkout; validate it server-side before using it.

Bulgu: /api/blog/posts documents keyset pagination with before=<isoDate> but implementation uses page/pageSize.
Neden sorun: Client or crawler integrations built from the API contract can paginate incorrectly or duplicate/skip posts.
Önerilen çözüm: Align the implementation and comment/API contract; either implement keyset pagination or update all callers/docs/tests to page/pageSize.

Bulgu: /unsubscribe human confirmation page is not in the public middleware allow-list.
Neden sorun: Email recipients who are logged out may be redirected instead of reaching an unsubscribe confirmation flow, risking compliance and trust issues.
Önerilen çözüm: Add /unsubscribe to public routes and keep token validation inside the page/API.

Bulgu: Email verification/legal onboarding gate is not enforced at route level on sensitive billing APIs.
Neden sorun: A session can reach subscription/portal endpoints before the same app-level eligibility rules used by normal app mutations.
Önerilen çözüm: Use a single billing mutation guard that checks verified email, legal acceptance, and onboarding state before checkout/portal changes.

Bulgu: /api/auth/password/change has no dedicated rate limit or lockout for currentPassword attempts.
Neden sorun: An authenticated stolen session can brute-force the current password without the protections applied to login flows.
Önerilen çözüm: Add per-user/IP throttling, attempt logging, and alerting/step-up after repeated failures.

Bulgu: Security sessions list sets impersonated flag false because it does not select impersonatedById.
Neden sorun: Users cannot see that a session was created through admin impersonation, reducing transparency.
Önerilen çözüm: Select impersonatedById and surface it in the session response/audit UI.

Bulgu: /offline exists and the service worker references it, but middleware public page allow-list does not include it.
Neden sorun: Offline fallback can redirect through auth middleware instead of rendering the offline page.
Önerilen çözüm: Add /offline to public routes and test service worker fallback.

Bulgu: llms.txt silently returns an empty blog list on database error.
Neden sorun: AI/LLM discovery metadata degrades without any observable signal, hiding content index issues.
Önerilen çözüm: Log/monitor the failure and fall back to a cached/static recent-post list.

Bulgu: Address date/country semantic validation is missing.
Neden sorun: Invalid dates, inverted ranges, or unsupported country/state combinations can be persisted and then poison move/budget/provider logic.
Önerilen çözüm: Add schema-level validation for dates, start/end ordering, and country/state compatibility; mirror it in UI.

Bulgu: Primary address delete can promote a stale replacement under concurrent updates.
Neden sorun: Two concurrent mutations can leave no reliable current primary address or promote an unintended old address.
Önerilen çözüm: Perform primary promotion in a transaction with deterministic ordering and workspace-aware scope.

Bulgu: Service mutations use requireVerifiedUser only and do not enforce legal/onboarding mutation gate.
Neden sorun: Users can persist operational service data before completing the legal/onboarding state expected elsewhere.
Önerilen çözüm: Replace ad hoc guards with the app mutation guard used for other persisted user data.

Bulgu: contractEndDate API validation and web edit renewal fields are inconsistent.
Neden sorun: Users can store renewal/contract data that the UI cannot fully edit or validate, causing stale billing reminders and inaccurate plans.
Önerilen çözüm: Normalize service contract schema, expose all editable renewal fields, and validate the same shape on client/server.

Bulgu: /api/moving/migration is not workspace-scoped; it only queries user-owned addresses/services.
Neden sorun: Family/Pro shared workspace migration analysis ignores shared records visible elsewhere, producing incomplete move plans.
Önerilen çözüm: Use resolveWorkspaceDataScope/scopedRecordWhere consistently for migration queries.

Bulgu: Move-task generation/update uses requireDbUserId only and can mutate service-related state through local effects.
Neden sorun: A partially onboarded or legally incomplete user can create/update app data and indirectly sync service state.
Önerilen çözüm: Use the app mutation guard and add tests for legal-gated mutation endpoints.

Bulgu: Moving plan moveDate and inline destination startDate are not validated as real dates.
Neden sorun: Invalid strings can pass into date conversion and scheduling logic, causing broken reminders or runtime errors.
Önerilen çözüm: Validate ISO dates with zod/refine and reject invalid/inverted move timelines.

Bulgu: Budget month drill-down page is not workspace-aware.
Neden sorun: A user viewing a shared workspace sees summary totals from scoped APIs but drill-down data from only their own records, causing mismatched financial decisions.
Önerilen çözüm: Convert drill-down loaders/actions to the same workspace scope used by budget summary APIs.

Bulgu: Provider detail and compare address context are not workspace-aware.
Neden sorun: Provider recommendations for shared/family workspaces can use only personal addresses/services, making recommendations inconsistent with the active workspace.
Önerilen çözüm: Apply workspace context to provider detail and comparison queries or clearly label them as personal-only.

Bulgu: Public provider popularity cohort does not filter soft-deleted address/service rows.
Neden sorun: Deleted user data can still affect provider popularity counts and recommendations.
Önerilen çözüm: Add deletedAt filters to all cohort aggregations.

Bulgu: Provider detail labels global userCount as state-specific usage.
Neden sorun: Users may make provider decisions from a misleading localized trust signal.
Önerilen çözüm: Separate global usage from state usage, or compute the displayed metric from the selected state cohort.

Bulgu: Provider shortlist and recommendation feedback mutations use only a session gate.
Neden sorun: Preference writes bypass the app's stronger mutation eligibility rules and can persist data for incomplete accounts.
Önerilen çözüm: Use requireVerifiedUser or the app mutation guard for preference writes.

Bulgu: Settings export UI lists workspace-visible addresses, but JSON/PDF export routes fetch user-owned records only. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/(app)/settings/export/page.tsx uses /api/addresses, while apps/web/src/app/api/export/route.ts and apps/web/src/app/api/export/pdf/route.ts query by userId.
Neden sorun: In Family/Pro workspaces, visible shared records can fail PDF export or be omitted from full exports, producing incomplete data archives and inconsistent privacy/product behavior.
Önerilen çözüm: Decide explicit export semantics. If export means current workspace data, use workspace data scope helpers; if export means personal GDPR data, hide shared records in the UI and label the export as owner-only.

Bulgu: Product copy says members keep private data, but invitation acceptance backfills existing addresses/services/moving plans into the shared workspace and non-child members read workspace-wide records. Evidence: apps/web/src/lib/workspace-invite-accept.ts backfills records; apps/web/src/lib/workspace-data-scope.ts scopedRecordWhere uses workspaceId; apps/web/src/app/api/addresses/route.ts decrypts formattedAddress for workspace reads; apps/web/src/app/(app)/settings/workspace/page.tsx says "private data".
Neden sorun: A new household/team member can expose existing address and service metadata to other members contrary to the user-facing promise, creating privacy and trust risk.
Önerilen çözüm: Choose one model and enforce it: either change copy/onboarding consent to clearly say records are shared, or add per-record/member visibility and avoid automatic backfill without explicit consent.

Bulgu: Token-based invite accept requires only getUserSession plus email string match, while in-app accept requires requireVerifiedUser. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/invitations/[token]/accept/route.ts vs apps/web/src/app/api/invitations/pending/[id]/accept/route.ts.
Neden sorun: A user can sign in with an unverified password account for the invited email and join a workspace before proving mailbox ownership.
Önerilen çözüm: Require requireVerifiedUser for token accept too, and route unverified users to email verification before accepting the invitation.

Bulgu: Ownership transfer changes Workspace.ownerUserId, which is also the entitlement/seat anchor, without transferring/canceling Stripe billing or requiring the target owner to have an eligible plan. Evidence: apps/web/src/lib/workspace-ownership.ts and apps/web/src/app/api/workspaces/[id]/transfer/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Paid Family/Pro access can become governed by a free target user's subscription while the former owner may still pay, causing seat collapse, billing confusion, and incorrect entitlement enforcement.
Önerilen çözüm: Treat billing owner and administrative owner separately, or block/sequence transfer until the target accepts billing responsibility and has the required subscription.

Bulgu: Workspace creation cap is checked before create outside the transaction. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/workspaces/route.ts checks ownedCount then creates workspace.
Neden sorun: Concurrent POST requests can exceed MAX_OWNED_WORKSPACES, multiplying workspace seat pools beyond the intended cap.
Önerilen çözüm: Enforce the cap with a serializable transaction, owner-scoped lock, or database-backed quota invariant.

Bulgu: Invalid or unauthorized X-Workspace-Id / lf_workspace_id silently falls back to the caller's oldest workspace, including on mutation paths through resolveWorkspaceDataScope.
Neden sorun: A stale client selection can write new addresses/services/tasks into a different workspace than the user intended; it is security-safe but data-destructive/confusing.
Önerilen çözüm: For explicit X-Workspace-Id on mutating requests, return 403/409 and ask the client to reselect; reserve silent fallback for read requests or stale cookies only.

Bulgu: Workspace rename validation is inconsistent: /api/workspaces/[id] enforces 1-60 chars while /api/workspaces/[id]/rename slices to 120 chars.
Neden sorun: Different clients can persist names the settings UI rejects, causing inconsistent display and validation behavior.
Önerilen çözüm: Keep one rename endpoint or share a single zod/schema validator and max length.

Bulgu: Stripe Checkout sessions do not enable automatic_tax, billing address collection, or tax ID collection. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts sessionParams. Varsayım: web subscriptions may require sales/SaaS tax handling in some jurisdictions.
Neden sorun: Tax may be under-collected or unsupported for jurisdictions where SaaS/subscription tax applies, and invoices may lack address/tax evidence.
Önerilen çözüm: Decide tax nexus requirements; if needed, enable Stripe Tax automatic_tax, collect/update billing addresses, and test tax-inclusive/exclusive receipts.

Bulgu: Stripe SDK/API is pinned to stripe 16.12.0 and API version 2024-06-20, while the Stripe skill's current reference expects latest 2026-02-25.clover. Evidence: apps/web/package.json and apps/web/src/lib/stripe-api-version.ts.
Neden sorun: Older API behavior can drift from current Stripe docs, and preview flexible-billing calls increase upgrade risk.
Önerilen çözüm: Plan a Stripe SDK/API upgrade, run webhook fixture regression tests, and remove preview API usage once stable equivalents are available.

Bulgu: Subscription change-plan and switch-cycle endpoints accept only acceptedSubscriptionTerms=true and do not persist a versioned disclosure/price/proration snapshot. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/subscription/change-plan/route.ts and switch-cycle/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Later billing disputes cannot reconstruct exactly what the user accepted for immediate proration, deferred downgrade, new price, or renewal timing.
Önerilen çözüm: Store terms/policy versions, target plan/interval, effective date, price label, proration/deferred copy, IP/user-agent hash, and acceptedAt for every plan/cycle change.

Bulgu: Stripe portal session creation checks only stripeCustomerId, not provider/status/active Stripe subscription. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/stripe/portal/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Store-managed/admin-granted or stale historical Stripe customers can see an irrelevant Stripe portal, confusing cancellation/update-payment flows.
Önerilen çözüm: Require provider=STRIPE and a current stripeSubscriptionId/status appropriate for portal, or return store/admin-specific guidance.

Bulgu: Subscription UI says yearly-to-monthly switch credits unused annual time toward future monthly invoices, but the code schedules year-to-month downgrade at period end with proration_behavior none. Evidence: apps/web/src/components/settings/subscription-management.tsx and apps/web/src/app/api/subscription/switch-cycle/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Users may expect a credit that is not created because access remains annual until period end and monthly starts after that.
Önerilen çözüm: Change copy to say monthly billing starts at period end with no credit or charge today, or implement immediate downgrade with credits if that is the intended policy.

Bulgu: One-click unsubscribe and Resend bounce/complaint suppression write only legacy MARKETING/REMINDER/LIFECYCLE preference rows, while current settings use granular rows such as BILL_REMINDER, BILL_OVERDUE, CONTRACT_EXPIRY, TASK_REMINDER, MOVE_ALERT, WEEKLY_DIGEST, and MONTHLY_REPORT. Evidence: apps/web/src/lib/unsubscribe.ts, unsubscribe-actions.ts, notification-preferences.ts.
Neden sorun: Existing senders often still check legacy rows, but the settings UI can remain opted-in and any granular sender can regress unsubscribe/complaint compliance.
Önerilen çözüm: On unsubscribe/bounce/complaint, disable both legacy and all current EMAIL preference types in the selected category; add regression tests where direct granular rows are true before unsubscribe.

Bulgu: Notification preference writes and support ticket create/reply/close use requireDbUserId only. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/notifications/route.ts, notifications/preferences/route.ts, tickets/route.ts, tickets/[id]/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Unverified or legally incomplete accounts can persist communication preferences and support content even though other app mutations require stronger gates.
Önerilen çözüm: Decide whether support must remain available pre-verification; otherwise use requireVerifiedUser/requireAppMutationUser. If support remains open, explicitly document and limit the exception.

Bulgu: Notification preference endpoints have no per-user/IP rate limit.
Neden sorun: A compromised session or buggy client can churn preference rows and create unnecessary DB load.
Önerilen çözüm: Add a modest mutation throttle for /api/notifications and /api/notifications/preferences PUT/POST.

Bulgu: A scheduled-delivery worker exists and the GitHub Actions cron calls it, but Vercel and Ofelia scheduler configs omit /api/cron/scheduled-delivery and the admin notifications API still advertises schedulingEnabled=false/workerEnabled=false while rejecting future sendAt. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/cron/scheduled-delivery/route.ts, .github/workflows/cron.yml, apps/web/vercel.json, docker/ofelia.ini, apps/admin/src/app/api/notifications/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Scheduled NotificationQueue rows and future notification UX depend on which scheduler/deploy target is active; one deployment path drains the queue, the others never do, and admin code contradicts the worker's existence.
Önerilen çözüm: Pick one canonical scheduler contract; add scheduled-delivery to every production scheduler or remove the route, then enable admin scheduling only after queue retries/preferences are aligned.

Bulgu: Reminder routes self-gate on local 8am using isReminderDeliveryHour, but Vercel/Ofelia configs still call user-facing reminders at fixed 07:00/08:00/10:00 UTC; only .github/workflows/cron.yml has the required 12:00-18:00 UTC per-US-zone slots.
Neden sorun: If deployment uses Vercel crons or Ofelia instead of GitHub Actions, US users will mostly be skipped because 08:00 UTC is not 08:00 local for US zones.
Önerilen çözüm: Keep exactly one active production scheduler or update all scheduler configs to the same 12-18 UTC fan-out; add a CI check that scheduler configs include every local-hour gated route and slot.

Bulgu: Web Vercel and Ofelia configs schedule weekly-digest only on Monday, but the route supports user-selected digestDay and GitHub Actions intentionally calls it daily. Evidence: apps/web/vercel.json, docker/ofelia.ini, .github/workflows/cron.yml, apps/web/src/app/api/cron/weekly-digest/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Users who select Tuesday-Sunday digest days receive nothing on scheduler targets that still run Monday only.
Önerilen çözüm: Align Vercel/Ofelia with the daily 09:00 UTC GitHub schedule or remove stale scheduler files from production paths.

Bulgu: provider-stats counts Service rows by providerId and isActive only, without deletedAt/user-deleted filters. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/cron/provider-stats/route.ts.
Neden sorun: Soft-deleted services or deleted-account grace data can inflate provider popularity/userCount, which feeds public trust/social-proof UI.
Önerilen çözüm: Count only deletedAt=null services whose owners are not deleted; consider workspace visibility and anonymous aggregation thresholds.

Bulgu: blog-publish reads due posts, then updates by id inside a transaction without a status='SCHEDULED' guarded claim; scheduled-delivery has a guarded implementation for the same publish task.
Neden sorun: Concurrent cron invocations can both select the same due post and duplicate revalidation/IndexNow pings; not data-corrupting but noisy and inconsistent with the newer worker.
Önerilen çözüm: Replace blog-publish with the guarded scheduled-delivery publish code or use updateMany where id+status=SCHEDULED before pinging.

Bulgu: scheduled-delivery atomically marks NotificationQueue.sent=true before delivery and records error without retry if delivery fails.
Neden sorun: This prevents double-send, but transient Resend/Expo/DB errors become permanent missed notifications unless an operator manually requeues rows.
Önerilen çözüm: Add explicit states such as CLAIMED/SENDING/SENT/FAILED with attemptCount and retryAfter; keep dedupe keys for at-most-once side effects while allowing safe retry of rows with no successful channel.

Bulgu: scheduled-delivery delivers EMAIL/PUSH/SMS via sendNotification without checking granular notification preferences; sendNotification's EMAIL path uses sendLoggedEmail directly, which does not apply preference or unsubscribe-category checks.
Neden sorun: Future queued admin/system notifications can bypass user opt-outs depending on who wrote NotificationQueue, and the worker has no type-to-preference mapping.
Önerilen çözüm: Store notification intent/category on queue rows and enforce isWebNotificationEnabled/isPushTypeEnabled in scheduled-delivery before extra channel delivery; reserve bypass only for explicit transactional/emergency types.

Bulgu: Manual /api/connector-dispatch defaults to the user's primary address and calls enqueueAddressChange without workspaceId, while enqueueAddressChange can scope by workspaceId only if provided. Evidence: apps/web/src/app/api/connector-dispatch/route.ts and apps/web/src/lib/connector-runtime.ts.
Neden sorun: In a shared-workspace context, sync-now can ignore the selected workspace and dispatch only user-owned primary data, diverging from workspace-visible address state.
Önerilen çözüm: Pass the resolved active workspace from the request/cookie/header into connector dispatch or require an explicit addressId that is authorized under the same workspace scope.

Bulgu: enqueueAddressChange enforces connector per-minute/per-day caps by count queries before creating dispatch rows, outside the transaction that inserts rows.
Neden sorun: Concurrent enqueue requests can both pass the cap and create more live ConnectorDispatch rows than the connector manifest allows.
Önerilen çözüm: Move cap enforcement into a transaction with a durable per-user/per-connector counter or unique time-bucket guard.

Bulgu: runDueDispatches converts live rows stuck in DISPATCHING for 15 minutes or SUBMITTED for 7 days directly to NEEDS_USER without attempting partner-side status lookup.
Neden sorun: Users may be asked to manually retry/verify even when the partner already accepted the change; for COA-style filings this creates support ambiguity.
Önerilen çözüm: Add connector-specific verify/resume hooks for stale rows before NEEDS_USER, and expose confirmation/status evidence in admin/user UI.
